name: David Obstler
background: David Obstler has served as our Chief Financial Officer since 2018. Prior to joining Datadog, Mr. Obstler was the Chief Financial Officer of TravelClick, a hospitality technology company. He has also served as CFO at OpenLink Financial, MSCI Inc., and RiskMetrics Group. Mr. Obstler holds a B.A. from Yale University and an M.B.A. from Harvard Business School.
